markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Phalcon

A curated list of awesome Phalcon libraries and resources. Inspired by awesome-gostars65.5k.

Contributing

Please take a quick gander at the contribution guidelines first. Thanks to all contributors; you rock!

Join us on Discord to chat with other awesome-phalcon maintainers!

Contents

  • Awesome Phalcon

    • ACL
    • Application Skeleton
    • Authentication & OAuth
    • CMS & Blogs

ACL

Access control list.

  • PhalconUserPluginstars188 - Plugin based on Vökuró ACL idea

Application Skeleton

Various application skeletons.

  • Album O'Ramastars84 - Sample modular application for the Phalcon Framework
  • Base Appstars64 - The base application in Phalcon Framework
  • INVO Applicationstars342 - Sample application for the Phalcon Framework
  • MVCstars776 - Examples of Phalcon MVC file structures
  • Phalcon Composerstars31 - Phalcon with Composer support MySql MongoDb Redis, clean + beauty
  • Vökuróstars353 - Sample application for Phalcon Framework (Acl, Auth, Security)
  • Webirdstars101 - Webird was created to merge the latest PHP and Node.js innovations into a single application stack
  • NovaMOOCstars9 - Sample application with API/BackEnd and FrontEnd + Authentication with JWT + Cypress tests with GitHub Actions + Docker compose.
  • Sakura Panelstars39 - A Phalcon Panel created to install plugins Without Editing the Panel Source Code (Auth, ACL, Lite Bootstrap Template, And more...).

Authentication & OAuth

Libraries for implementing authentications schemes.

  • Padlockstars18 - A docker-based phalcon authentication server built on top of the PHP OAuth 2.0 Server
  • phalcon-authmiddlewarestars29 - Add middleware events to the dispatcher. Generic design that's compatible with ACL or a custom auth library.

CMS & Blogs

Content management systems & blogs.

  • giada-wwwstars11 - Official website of Giada Loop Machine
  • KikCMSstars46 - CMS built on Phalcon Framework
  • Skopy Blog Enginestars8 - A simple blog engine for those who want to start learning Phalcon
  • Yona CMSstars374 - CMS based on Phalcon Framework with modular structure
  • PhalconCMSstars148 - A blog built on Phalcon Framework
  • Hummingbird CMSstars3 - A CMS based on Phalcon 4 with many powerful features

Command Line

Command line applications & tools.

  • phalcon-consolestars8 - Sample bootstraping application for command line applications using the outstanding Phalcon Framework
  • phalcon-cronstars74 - Cron component for Phalcon

Config

  • Phalcon Config Loader for Yamlstars1 - Loads all the yml in the directory of the app/config.

Dashboard

Admin Panels & Dashboards.

  • PhalconTimestars5 - TimeKeeping tool / Dashboard skeleton

Debug

Debug & profiling tools.

  • ddstars16 - This package will add the dd and dump helpers to your Phalcon application
  • Phalcon BB Debuggerstars5 - Phalcon BB Debugger Strong and easy install.
  • Phalcon Debugbarstars159 - Integrates PHP Debug Bar with Phalcon Framework
  • Prophilerstars444 - PHP Profiler & Developer Toolbar (built for Phalcon)

i18n

List of i18n and l10n libraries and services.

  • xgettext-templatestars78 - Extract gettext messages from Volt templates using a command line program that is identical to the xgettext invocation.

Integration

Integration with third party services

  • phalcon-logentriesstars10 - Sends log messages to the Logentries log management service

IDE

List of extensions for IDE

  • volt-phalcon-language - An extension for VS Code which provides support for the Phalcon Volt syntax and completion-auto

Miscellaneous

These libraries were placed here because none of the other categories seemed to fit

  • Breadcrumbsstars40 - Powerful and flexible component for building site breadcrumbs in Phalcon 2+.
  • Feedback - Is intended to be used as a replacement for Phalcon's built-in Flash and Message functionality
  • Incubatorstars733 - Repository to publish/share/experiment with new adapters, prototypes or functionality that can potentially be incorporated into the Phalcon Framework
  • yarakstars26 - Laravel inspired Phalcon devtools
  • phalcon-data-tablestars0 - Allows you to simplify the interaction with the bootstrap-table in the Phalcon

ORM

Libraries that implement Object-Relational Mapping or datamapping techniques.

  • phalcon-boundmodelsstars3 - Automatically get models based on dispatcher parameters within the Phalcon framework
  • phalcon-repositoriesstars17 - Easy Repository pattern for Phalcon
  • phalcon-seederstars9 - Database seeder component for Phalcon
  • phalcon-redis-modelstars13 - redis based ORM and Easy Criteria (The correspondence of MySQL sharding.)

ODM

Libraries that implement Object-Document Mapper techniques.

  • phalcon-collection-paginatorstars1 - A pagination adapter for classes that extend Phalcon\Mvc\Collection

Provisioning

Tools for provisioning a system for a Phalcon application.

  • ansible-phalconstars0 - Ansible Role to install Phalcon Framework in Debian (provides PHP 5.6 and PHP 7.0 packages)
  • setupifystars2 - A collection of bash scripts for provisioning a Zephir and Phalcon based system for deployement or development

RESTful

Representational state transfer.

  • phalcon-json-api-packagestars35 - A composer package designed to help you create a JSON:API in Phalcon
  • PhREST APIstars30 - Phalcon Framework REST API Package
  • REST APIstars70 - Implementation of an API application using the Phalcon

Routing

Various routing libraries & extensions.

  • Phalcon-autorouterstars27 - Simple way to auto load modules without complicate definition of routes
  • Phalcon Routing for Yamlstars3 - Routing can be easily configured with yaml

Searching

Searching tools & libraries.

  • ElasticsearchIndexerstars9 - Elasticsearch indexer component for Phalcon

SEO

Seo tools.

  • Phalcon meta tagsstars9 - Tools for work with meta tags.

Shop & Ecommerce

  • Shopping Cartstars1 - Simple cart for online store

Talks

Conferences, Chats, Forums, etc..

  • Phanbookstars295 - The source for code phanbook.com website
  • Phosphorumstars359 - The source for official Phalcon Forum

Templating

Libraries and tools for templating.

  • twig-phalconstars4 - Twig Template Engine for Phalcon Framework

Testing

Testing tools and solutions.

  • phalcon-demostars37 - A modified Phalcon INVO Application to demonstrate basics of Codeception testing.

Server Applications

  • packagecloudstars26 - Phalcon distribution hosted on PackageCloud
  • phalcon-docker-nginxstars25 - Phalcon 3, PHP7, Docker sample starter application
  • phalcon-vmstars43 - Vagrant configuration for Phalcon 3.x and PHP7.0 development + MySQL/PostgreSQL/MongoDB, Redis/Memcached, Gearman/RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch/Sphinxsearch on your choice
  • phalcon3-composestars2 - Docker Phalcon 3 development environment

Resources

Where to discover new Phalcon libraries.

Conferences

Conferences, IRC, Forums, etc..

Communities

  • Facebook - Phalcon on Facebook
  • Gab - Phalcon on Gab
  • Phalcon Forums - Phalcon Forums
  • Phalcon Russian Community Chat - Russian Community Chat in Gitter.im
  • Stack Overflow - StackOverflow Tagged Questions
  • Twitter - Phalcon on Twitter

Slides

  • Phalcon - Develop powerful web applications in PHP - Slides used to present Phalcon V4 during the Human Talks Lyon - 11 february 2020

Books

  • Phalcon Book (in French) - Phalcon : Develop complex and powerful web applications in PHP

E-Books

  • Phalcon PDF Documentation - Phalcon Framework Documentation

Magazines

  • French magazine - Programmez n°239 - The 10 commandments of eco-design (article mentioning Phalcon as a light and ecological Framework)
  • French magazine - Programmez n°241 - Phalcon : the new must-know PHP framework
  • German magazine - PHPMagazin n°1.21 - The Phalcon among the PHP frameworks

Websites

  • Built With - Gallery of applications, demos and projects built with Phalcon Framework
  • Phalcon Blog - Phalcon Blog
  • Phalconiststars28 - Resources catalog for Phalcon Framework on Phalconist

Tutorials

  • Phalcon Documentation - Phalcon Documentation
  • Sitepoint - Articles, tutorials and so more
  • Tutsplus - Tutsplus Code Courses
